examples: Lenore said she wanted the moon.
The jester laughed Lenore and wanted to see the king's jeweler.
Lenore Skenazy takes her two sons to the park and leaves them there.
Ms. LENORE SEELEY (Central New York Works): Work isn't what it used to be.
Lenore Seeley(ph), who heads a federally funded job center called Central New York Works, says manufacturing jobs like that are hard to find in Syracuse these days.
